label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael attacked solo on final climb's 10-12% ramps while ROGLIC Primoz crashed descending but still gained time on BERNAL and YATES
tactical_patterns: Roglic attacked final climb despite holding red jersey, revealing aggressive time-gaining strategy even from race lead position.
31-rider break quality forced peloton to concede red jersey rather than chase, showing team calculation of jersey defense costs.
Storer pre-empted sprint by attacking on steepest 10-12% gradients, exploiting climbing superiority over faster finishers in break.
Roglic-Mas-Lopez-Haig alliance chased together after crash, demonstrating GC riders cooperating to isolate Bernal-Yates group behind.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Attacked final climb despite holding red, gained time on rivals even after descent crash, shows aggressive form
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Looked secondhand on final climb, couldn't follow Roglic acceleration, lost time with Yates group
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Unable to offer chase on final climb, isolated with Bernal while rivals gained 20+ seconds
rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Second stage win via long-range attack on steepest gradients, superior climbing power neutralizes sprint disadvantage
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Followed Roglic attack and cooperated to extend gap on Bernal-Yates, tactical awareness shown
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Made split with Roglic group on climb, showing improved positioning and form
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: Unexpectedly followed Roglic attack and gained time on higher-profile GC rivals Bernal-Yates
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: Faded on final climb despite being in 31-rider break, concerning climbing weakness revealed
